title: HP accelerates enterprise workflows with OpenAI Frontier
slides: HP partners with OpenAI—but what changes for your team?
This integrates OpenAI's Frontier models into HP devices.
It doesn't just assist—it automates multi-step enterprise tasks.
Your workflows now skip manual data transfers between apps.
Test one approval chain today: see minutes turn to seconds.
thread_text:
1. Your HP device just grew a brain.

HP signed with OpenAI. Frontier models are now baked into hardware you already own.

2. This isn't a chatbot upgrade.

It automates multi-step enterprise tasks. No more copying data between apps.

3. The real shift is invisible.

Your workflows skip manual transfers. Approvals, reports, syncs—gone from your to-do list.

4. One chain decides the bet.

Simulate an approval flow today. Take a real request and time it manually, then with the new system.

5. Can you afford not to test?

Pick one approval chain this week. Run it both ways and compare the seconds saved.
video_script: Frontier models come to your device.
It automates multi-step tasks for you.

script: Frontier models come to your device.
It automates multi-step tasks for you.

instagram.caption:
Your HP device just grew a brain 🤖—OpenAI's Frontier models are now built into the hardware you already own.

This isn't a chatbot upgrade. It automates multi-step enterprise tasks—no more copying data between apps. Approvals, reports, and syncs skip your to-do list entirely.

For anyone creating or publishing content, manual data transfers between tools disappear from your daily workflow.

Pick one approval chain this week. Run it manually, then with the new system ⏱️. What do you do with the minutes you save?
